title: agrimonia eupatoria f. longifolia
intro: Agrimonia eupatoria f. longifolia, also known as Agrimony, is a flowering plant that belongs to the rose family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Agrimonia eupatoria f. longifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and promote wound healing. Agrimonia eupatoria f. longifolia is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
